result:
Done. **484/484 assertions pass, mypy clean across all 13 modules.**

Summary of fixes — 29 bugs total across 12 files:

**16 type errors (found by mypy):**
- `procurement.py`: wrong accessor (`purchaseorder_supplier_id` → `poline_product_id`), missing arg to `reorder_needed`
- `orders.py`: passed `c.id` instead of `c.tier` to `tier_discount_pct`
- `employees.py`: passed `str(employee_id)` instead of `employee_id` to `order_commission`
- `promotions.py`: passed `customer.id` instead of `customer.tier` to `tier_qualifies`
- `billing.py`: missing arg to `order_customer_id`, swapped status/issued_at in `mark_invoice_paid`, untyped reduce accumulator
- `shipping.py`: passed string `"pending"` instead of `order_id` to `shipments_for_order`
- `notifications.py`: missing `sent_at` arg in `create_notification`
- `analytics.py`: missing `orders` arg in `orders_in_period` call
- `audit.py`: wrong type for entity_id in `audit_shipment`, missing `orders` arg in `find_order_by_id`, non-narrowed Optional

**13 logic errors (found by verify):**
- `catalog.py`: reversed margin subtraction, filtered by `product_id` instead of `product_category_id`
- `customers.py`: gold/bronze discount percentages swapped
- `inventory.py`: inverted reorder comparison (`>` → `<`)
- `orders.py`: tax doubled (`2 *`), discount added instead of subtracted
- `shipping.py`: used `carrier_id` instead of `carrier_base_rate`, zone surcharge was additive instead of percentage
- `billing.py`: `invoices_for_customer` filtered on `order_id` instead of `customer_id`
- `promotions.py`: `campaign_active` used `campaign.id` instead of `start_date`, percentage divided by 10 instead of 100
- `employees.py`: `find_employee_by_id` compared `hire_date` instead of `id`
- `audit.py`: `audit_order` used `order_customer_id` instead of `order_id`
